verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I'm only a pilgrim and stranger, in this unfriendly world I roam, serving him who has called me from darkness, and promised a heavenly home, of his wonderful love I am telling, where ever on earth I may be, I'm striving each day to be faithful, to the Savior who suffered for me.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I'm longing for home, for the sun's going down, I want to go where, sweet rest can be found, I'm just about through, with this old house of clay, I'm leaving this world, for glory someday.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Soon labors on earth will be ended, we'll be leaving this old world for aye, we'll leave the dark valley of shadows, for a land that is better they say, in the Bible we read of a city, who's builder is Jesus we're told, someday this frail tent will be folded, and the beautiful scene shall unfold.
